name: Religious or Philosophical Beliefs
description: Religious affiliation, spiritual practices, or philosophical beliefs.

regulatory_basis.name: GDPR Article 9(1)
regulatory_basis.summary: Religious or philosophical beliefs are a special category of personal data.

regulatory_basis.name: US Fair Housing Act
regulatory_basis.summary: Prohibits targeting by religion in housing advertising.

regulatory_basis.name: US Title VII / EEOC
regulatory_basis.summary: Prohibits targeting by religion in employment advertising.

excludes: Holiday interest segments (e.g., 'Christmas shoppers') unless used as religious proxy
Cultural event attendance (e.g., 'Diwali celebrations') unless used as religious proxy
guidance: Holiday and cultural event targeting is a common edge case. Targeting 'Christmas shoppers' is commercial intent, not religious targeting. Targeting 'devout Christians' is religious targeting. The distinction is whether the signal infers belief or captures commercial behavior.
